name: Ambazonia (proposed)

colors.symbolism: the upper stripe — peace and the Atlantic
the central stripe and the stars
the lower stripe — repeats the upper

description: Three horizontal stripes — blue, white, blue — with a half-circle of small white five-pointed stars on the central white stripe; charged with a black or contrasting central element representing a dove or the territory.
history: Flag of the self-declared Federal Republic of Ambazonia, the secessionist movement seeking independence for the Anglophone (former British) regions of Cameroon (Northwest and Southwest provinces). Independence was declared on 1 October 2017 in the context of the ongoing Anglophone Crisis. Internationally unrecognised.

features.symbolism: the historical counties / divisions of Southern Cameroons
